## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's blog strategy, SEO performance, and content migration.](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog migration to '/blog' slug is nearly complete; site map automation pending](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - ["DeepFake" keyword performing well (7th top performer) but needs careful branding](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [78 use case articles published, 17 more coming; focusing on 5 key use cases](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [API-related content to be published (4-5 articles) for traction and insights](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

## Topics

### Blog Migration and SEO Updates

  - [Redirections live: everything moving to '/blog' slug](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - ['/article' slug to be phased out in the next week](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Site map automation still pending](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [New posts currently only show in related posts, not main directory](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Blog getting design revamp; careful about patches until new design](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

### DeepFake Keyword Performance

  - ["DeepFake" ranking jumped quickly, now 7th top performer](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Getting good signups and activation rates](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Strategy: Use as SEO term, not overtaking brand](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Content approach: Soften "DeepFake" by associating with "Digital Twin"](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Created article: "How to use DeepFake ethically"](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Use Case Content Strategy

  - [78 use case articles published, 17 more this week](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [45 new ideas from extra use cases provided](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Aiming for 100+ use case articles total](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Focusing on 5 key use cases: video ads, social media, product explainers, how-to videos, training for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [New report being developed to categorize content easily](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### API-Related Content

  - [Plan to publish 4-5 API-related topics for traction](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Focus on how SaaS tools can connect via API with HeyGen](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Use same use cases as main content, but API-focused](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Example: Ads API integration](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [Continue publishing in current flow (Sanity)](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Blog landing page has low utility currently; traffic mainly from search](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Growth natives to move remaining content to Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Ensure keywords are added to new content in Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Localization Plans

  - [Homepage to be localized, starting with Spanish](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Ready to discuss Portuguese localization](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to analyze performance of API-intended articles and generate more ideas](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Holly to share the five key use cases in chat](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Mariana to find more content ideas related to the top 5 use cases](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Nav to get Growth natives to start moving remaining content to Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Yury to create a Loom video for content migration process](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Team to prepare for homepage localization, starting with Spanish on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/VBYyfBxfjCF8Ak7CwnMbjaWxMfPpSp1F?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
